captions: Despite their lowest rate of volunteering, seniors aged 75 and older gave more hours on average than any other age group.
The growth in Korea's total researcher population closely mirrors the rise in researchers per 1,000 economically active people.
Coal and peat stayed in the top position, but the rankings of other energy sources changed between 1971 and 2007.
School enrollment remained consistently high for ages 5–17, while enrollment has increased among both younger children and older teenagers.
The only period where the growth rate in the number of hours worked exceeded the labor productivity growth rate was the 1980-1989 period.
Editors had the second-highest percentage of women across all three years.
The projected share of Asia Pacific in 2025, the largest among the six regions, is more than three times that of Europe in the same year.
In each age group, males had higher average kilocalorie intake from sugar-sweetened beverages than females did.
Different countries dominate each waste management category, with landfilling being most prominent in the United States, energy from waste in Sweden, and recycling in Austria.
